docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,750.00 FILED BY VACCARO, LU AS TO DEFENDANT GOOTEE, JAMES BLAHA, BRYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VACCARO, LU ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO BRIAN BLAHA ON 05/03/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BLAHA, BRYAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-13-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOOTEE, JAMES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED APR-04-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BLAHA, BRYAN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY VACCARO, LU GOOTEE, JAMES BLAHA, BRYAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VACCARO, LU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLAHA, BRYAN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, THIS JUDGMENT IS AGAINST DEFENDANT BLAHA ONLY. DEFENDANT JAMES GOOTEE WAS DISMISSED BY PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-02-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-02-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF LU VACCARO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES GOOTEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRYAN BLAHA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAMES GOOTEE WAS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF ON OPEN RECORD DURING PROCEEDINGS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF VACCARO, LU
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
